name: Filter Transactions
description: Searches and filters transactions by account, category, amount range, description, or house-related tags. Use this when the user asks about specific spending categories, transactions at a particular store, spending on the house, or transactions within a dollar amount range.
author: Michael

account.description: Filter by account name (partial match). Example: 'Ally', 'Chase', 'Amex'

category.description: Filter by category name (exact match). Example: 'Groceries', 'Dining', 'Gas'

description.description: Filter by transaction description (partial match). Example: 'Walmart', 'Amazon'

min_amount.description: Minimum transaction amount (use negative for debits)

house_tag.description: Set to 'true' to only show house-related transactions

start_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to 90 days ago.

end_date.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.
